title: Nahant
content:
All day the waves assailed the rock,
    I heard no church-bell chime,
    The sea-beat scorns the minster clock
    And breaks the glass of Time.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "Nahant", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
